operator_flip.admission_rule: §6.2 — occupancy below degrade incl. P95-forecast added burn + cold-prefix warmup per pipeline; hard deps and mayBeInvalidatedBy clear; one implementer per isolated worktree; never force a slot
operator_flip.rework_attribution: attribute rework/merge-conflict cost to concurrency in run-log
operator_flip.i12: implementers start one tier below panel (config-resolved); escalate per ladder on durable FAILs; per-model outcomes in run-log; ~40% implementer-FAIL rate trips profile start tier back up + ledger note
operator_flip.live_rung: statusline dump present this session — concurrency-3 flip genuinely active (prior firing ran conservative-serial on assumed 0.3)

watch_items: stale-generation errors on the event log
gate-stamp vs HEAD races at sequential merges of parallel branches
